question: What services do you offer?
answer: I specialize in building production-ready Backend Systems, Agentic AI Architectures, and RAG pipelines. I also offer custom system integration, API development, performance optimization, and DevOps pipeline automation.

question: What is your experience with AI and LLMs?
answer: I design and build multi-step agent systems using LangGraph and LangChain, integrate OpenAI/Gemini APIs, construct high-performance RAG pipelines (using Pinecone, FAISS, and Weaviate), and build LLM evaluation/hallucination detection harnesses.

question: How do you handle backend scalability?
answer: I build distributed Java Spring Boot and Python microservices, handle containerization with Docker/Kubernetes, deploy on AWS, and use Dynatrace for deep JVM profiling, heap/GC analysis, and bottleneck mitigation.

question: Can you work with existing engineering teams?
answer: Absolutely! I integrate easily with modern agile engineering teams. I have extensive experience setting up automated CI/CD pipelines (Jenkins, GitHub Actions, Ansible) and establishing unit testing frameworks (JUnit, Mockito, Playwright) with SonarQube quality gates.
